name: qa
description: Single-cam Q&A / hotline from stage cam. Same stage chain as listicle; project manifest should set reframe.preset='stage' (zoom 1.6, eye_y 0.18 — tight ROI excludes audience). Use multicam_qa pipeline (TODO) for host+guest split-screen.

notes.captions: host=white only (single cam = one speaker on screen); dual-color (host=white, guest=yellow) only if both speakers share the same camera frame.
notes.leadfix.head_trim: Keep ~0.063s — Q&A clips have the same SOP head-trim as listicles.
